recommended_action: Ask Michele for a high-resolution portrait he owns or has permission to use. Use as main About/hero image.

recommended_action: Ask for 5-10 original photos from farms, blueberries, raspberries, soilless systems, soil/fertigation work. Avoid client-identifiable locations unless clients approve.

recommended_action: Ask Michele whether he has the right to show the cover on his personal site. If yes, place it in Publications. If not, use text link only.

name: Macfrut, ItalianBerry, Cosmogarden, Fondazione Fojanini, CLT logos
recommended_action: Prefer text links. Use logos only if brand guidelines or explicit permission permit. Do not scrape images.
